gmail.subject: Final review of FY25 Audit
gmail.snippet: Hi Devendra, can we wrap the FY25 final review on Tuesday afternoon?
gmail.body:
Hi Devendra,

I've finished the second-pass review of the FY25 audit working papers. There are 3 open queries on inter-company eliminations and one classification question on the leasehold improvements — happy to walk through over a call.

Are you free Tuesday (May 5) afternoon to wrap this up so we can ship the draft to the client by EOW?

— Nilesh
